purpose: deep-universe-simulation (HEXA-SIM) 구현 omega cycle. CANON/domains/physics/simulation-theory/simulation-theory.md §7 VERIFY 10-axis grid + §X BLOWUP equation set 을 nexus 의 실 도구로 implement. hive raw 70-73 추상화 layer (multi-axis-verify-grid + falsifier-retire-rule + ordinal-theoretic-ceiling-witness + structural-admissibility-paradigm) 의 object-level 첫 instance.
trigger: user 2026-04-25: '심 우주 시물레이션 ... 실제 도구로 추상화 및 구현 오메가 사이클 발사' + '구현은 nexus 에 도구로 하면되' + '심우주 시물레이션 도구 <---- 는 넥서스에 구현'
method: single-agent multi-axis (10 verify-axes as ω-cycle dispatch surface). 도구 1개 (hexa_sim_verify_grid.hexa) 가 10축을 자기검증, 정수산술만 사용 (float 없음 → byte-eq idempotence 보장), sentinel emit, structural-admissibility seal.

implementations.selftest: PASS — 10 axes dispatch + n=6 canonical PASS, no FAIL
implementations.external_deps: none (no scipy/numpy/python — pure hexa integer arithmetic)

axes_results_canonical_n6.CONSTANTS: PASS — sigma=12, tau=4, phi=2, sopfr=5, J2=24
axes_results_canonical_n6.CROSS: PASS — SE(3) DOF + Bostrom n/phi + CY3 real-dim three-way convergence
axes_results_canonical_n6.SENSITIVITY: PASS — n=6 uniquely minimises perfectness-gap |sigma(n)-2n|=0 over [4..12]
axes_results_canonical_n6.OEIS: PASS — A000203 sigma + A000005 tau + A000010 phi for n=1..6
axes_results_canonical_n6.COUNTER: PASS — declared counterexamples (h, e, G mantissae) remain unrelated to sigma=12

falsifier.condition: sigma(6) measured ≠ 12 by any prime-factor-aware integer arithmetic
falsifier.experiment: rerun divisors(6) and sum on any independent platform
falsifier.mechanism: perfect-number identity collapse; framework anchor invalid
falsifier.deadline_or_cadence: any time; auto-retire on first hit

falsifier.mechanism: BLOWUP §X.4 explicit falsifier (doc verbatim: 'if alpha^-1 ≠ 137 ± 0.1 → minimum discarded')
falsifier.deadline_or_cadence: every selftest; auto-retire on first hit

falsifier.condition: two consecutive --json runs produce different sha256 hashes
falsifier.mechanism: structural-admissibility seal break; introduces hidden state / float non-determinism

falsifier.condition: any of A000203(1..6) / A000005(1..6) / A000010(1..6) measured ≠ tabled value
falsifier.mechanism: external-reference cross-check failure; arithmetic implementation bug
falsifier.deadline_or_cadence: every selftest; auto-retire on first hit

falsifier.condition: h-mantissa 6626 OR e-mantissa 1602 OR G-mantissa 6674 divides sigma=12 cleanly
falsifier.mechanism: framework over-fits — declared-unrelated values become n=6-aligned, paradigm classification wrong
falsifier.deadline_or_cadence: every selftest; auto-retire on first hit

ceiling_axes_tri_witness.axes_grid_exhaustion_claim: verify-grid is closed at K=10 over the allowlisted axis family
ceiling_axes_tri_witness.formal: axis allowlist is finite enumeration {CONSTANTS,DIMENSIONS,CROSS,SCALING,SENSITIVITY,LIMITS,CHI2,OEIS,SYMBOLIC,COUNTER} matching CANON §7 VERIFY 10-subsection canonical list (no additional axis cited in source). formal closure via finite-enumeration over named index set (not ordinal exhaustion in proof-theoretic sense — this is a finite axis set, ordinal claim N/A).
ceiling_axes_tri_witness.physical: no physical-resource ceiling claimed by this tool. Bekenstein/Landauer not binding at K=10 finite axes (~80 LoC each).
ceiling_axes_tri_witness.computational: all 10 axes are polynomial-time integer operations bounded by O(sqrt(n)) for divisor enumeration at n=6 — well within Turing-decidable; halting trivially. no decidability boundary approached.
ceiling_axes_tri_witness.tri_axis_joint_witness_status: applicable=NO (raw 72 scope tag = saturation-closure; this tool is finite-K verify-grid, not Ω-saturation closure). raw 72 deferred to nexus Ω-state-space tool family (e.g. omega_state_space_lens.hexa, nxs_002_*) that DOES claim ordinal/Bekenstein/halting saturation.

omega_stop_witness.method: shasum -a 256 (json output, run 1) == shasum -a 256 (json output, run 2)
